examples: About 1 of every 20 Germans is acompulsive hoarder, a new study has found.
So printing enough money to "satisfy the hoarder" is the only way of getting interest rates or the exchange-rate down.
You do not have to be a pack rat or hoarder to want to get more organized this year.
Clwyd Davies, 69, from Wrexham, became known as the "horse hoarder" and has not been seen for more than a week.
Los Angeles County Animal Care and Control officials plan to file felony animal cruelty charges against a man described as an animal hoarder.
